title: onychium multisectum
intro: Onychium multisectum, also known as the Chinese winter fern or Onychium, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Aspleniaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Onychium multisectum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
